'''Ivo Muna''' posed as a [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] at the [[Sorrus Medical Center]] in order to aid [[Ona Nobis]] in apprehending [[Astri Oddo]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue]]'' {{1st}} {{Voice}}
